slot.coordinate_note: x is from left; y is from top of the PNG. In LibGDX local bottom-left coordinates, slotBottomY = sourceHeight - y - height.

libgdx_notes.canvas_alignment: All full-size PNG layers are 2048x682 except edge_glow. Draw them at the same x/y/width/height as the original frame.
libgdx_notes.progress_clip: Draw loading_fill_full.png only inside slot.x..slot.x+slot.width*progress and slot.y..slot.y+slot.height, then draw frame overlay on top.
